creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 214869
Add a pkg-message to sndio

I'm sorry but I don't like it.  Sndio will work out of the box
without any setup and transparently in the simplest case and using
sndiod is optional.  This pkg-message gives the impression that you
must run sndiod to use audio/sndio which is just plain wrong.
